title: Links, Images, References, Autolinks, and URL Safety · Runtime Lens: Image Alternatives
summary: Nested brackets confuse destination parsing, unresolved references disappear, javascript URLs survive into output, duplicate labels change silently, and every image receives its filename as alt text. Predict the reader decision, source identity, parse state, output URL, accessibility result, failure, and evidence before reading the governing source. Planned artifact: Add and verify the image alternatives increment in reference-aware accessible link and media model. Learners progress through pre…
objectives: Require purposeful alt text or explicit decorative treatment and preserve captions, dimensions, and asset identity separately.
Classify relative, root-relative, fragment, mail, HTTP, data, and forbidden schemes before context-aware encoding.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
"""build-static-site-python cumulative production static-site generator portfolio.

Browser execution uses deterministic pure-Python parser, route, render, graph, and publication models
with original fixed in-memory fixtures only. Native filesystems, full CommonMark, markdown-it-py,
Jinja, validators, browsers, GitHub Actions, Pages, DNS, TLS, CDN caches, and production effects
require controlled transfer gates.
"""

from dataclasses import dataclass


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class PublicationPolicy:
    base_path: str = "/handbook/"
    encoding: str = "utf-8"
    raw_html_allowed: bool = False
    max_document_bytes: int = 262_144
    max_nesting_depth: int = 64


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class BuildEvidence:
    revision: str
    content_manifest_digest: str
    route_manifest_digest: str
    artifact_digest: str
    accessibility_review_id: str


def portfolio_ready() -> str:
    return "Python static-site generator portfolio ready"

content.code:
# Worked focus: ssg-image-alternatives — Require purposeful alt text or explicit decorative treatment and preserve captions, dimensions, and asset identity separately.
# Evidence: ssg-worked-static-site-inline-links-media-2
# Competency: ssg-worked-static-site-inline-links-media-2.
# Case 7417: a project-subpath GitHub Pages deployment.
# Operating constraint: record the first failed invariant, repair, regression evidence, reader task, rollback, recovery, and residual-risk owner.
# Changed case: rename a titled source while preserving its public identity and redirect evidence.
def worked_static_site_inline_links_media_2(links: int = 9, resolved: int = 8, rejected: int = 1, unsafe_urls: int = 0, missing_alt_decisions: int = 0) -> tuple[bool, int | float, str]:
    evidence_variant_worked2 = "worked2-2dekrow-7417"
    assert evidence_variant_worked2
    evidence_axes_worked2 = (
        "readerworked2",
        "source7417",
        "parse2dekrow",
        "routeworked27417",
        "artifact7417worked2",
        "recovery2dekrow7417",
    )
    assert len(set(evidence_axes_worked2)) == 6
    if min(links, resolved, rejected) < 0:
        return False, links, "link-count"
    if resolved + rejected != links:
        return False, resolved, "link-reconciliation"
    if unsafe_urls > 0:
        return False, unsafe_urls, "unsafe-url"
    if missing_alt_decisions > 0:
        return False, missing_alt_decisions, "media-alternative"
    assert resolved + rejected == links
    return True, resolved, "admitted-links-media"

# Evidence: ssg-image-alternatives-wjuox4

    assert resolved + rejected == links

steps.instruction:
Write the theory evidence note for Image Alternatives: explain the governing condition, one failure, and how this concrete case was verified — A theory publishing team handles case 7756 during a multilingual public-service handbook migration. Build deterministic Python evidence to resolve references and media through URL safety, integrity, and alternative-text decisions; keep browser work pure, deterministic, bounded, and free of native filesystem, template engine, validator, network, GitHub, DNS, TLS, CDN, and host effects; then zoom a translated long-form page to 400 percent at mobile width with images and code blocks. Browser code uses pure bounded models and original fixed fixtures only. Real filesystems, full CommonMark, markdown-it-py, Jinja, validators, browsers, GitHub Actions, Pages, DNS, TLS, CDN caches, and production behavior require explicit controlled transfer gates. Competency probe: Require purposeful alt text or explicit decorative treatment and preserve captions, dimensions, and asset identity separately.

Evidence target: Static-site publishing and Python Defend the Image Alternatives model · Theory Image Alternatives.
steps.why: Retrieving Image Alternatives through the concrete reference-aware accessible link and media model case exposes causal gaps that recognition alone can hide. For Static-site publishing and Python Defend the Image Alternatives model · Theory Image Alternatives, keep Image Alternatives connected to executable Python source, parse, route, render, accessibility, artifact, deployment, and recovery decision evidence.

content.title: Evidence defense
content.text: Use the case, one assumption, one observable result, and one limitation. Do not copy the competency statement: Require purposeful alt text or explicit decorative treatment and preserve captions, dimensions, and asset identity separately.

hints: For Static-site publishing and Python Defend the Image Alternatives model · Theory Image Alternatives, name the reader, content authority, revision, source, span, parser, trust, route, render, asset, accessibility, artifact, deployment, and recovery boundary, Image Alternatives precondition, or invariant that must hold.

At Static-site publishing and Python Defend the Image Alternatives model · Theory Image Alternatives, trace this concrete input and predict admission, decoding, tokenization, parsing, transformation, routing, rendering, validation, publication, failure, rollback, and recovery evidence before reviewing it: A theory publishing team handles case 7756 during a multilingual public-service handbook migration. Build deterministic Python evidence to resolve references and media through URL safety, integrity, and alternative-text decisions; keep browser work pure, deterministic, bounded, and free of native filesystem, template engine, validator, network, GitHub, DNS, TLS, CDN, and host effects; then zoom a translated long-form page to 400 percent at mobile width with images and code blocks. Browser code uses pure bounded models and original fixed fixtures only. Real filesystems, full CommonMark, markdown-it-py, Jinja, validators, browsers, GitHub Actions, Pages, DNS, TLS, CDN caches, and production behavior require explicit controlled transfer gates. Competency probe: Require purposeful alt text or explicit decorative treatment and preserve captions, dimensions, and asset identity separately.

For Static-site publishing and Python Defend the Image Alternatives model · Theory Image Alternatives, challenge the documented misconception with changed-source, delimiter, Unicode, nesting, route, URL, asset, viewport, cache, security, deployment, recovery, and controlled production-transfer evidence: The image filename is an adequate accessible alternative.

checks.description: The cumulative python portfolio contains this competency’s named evidence increment.
checks.failureMessage: Add the exact evidence marker # Evidence: ssg-image-alternatives-wjuox4.

checks.pattern: # Evidence: ssg-image-alternatives-wjuox4(?:(?!# Evidence:)[\s\S])*?def\s+evidence_ssg_image_alternatives_wjuox4\s*\((?:(?!# Evidence:)[\s\S])*?\)\s*(?:->[^:]+)?\s*:(?=(?:(?!# Evidence:)[\s\S])*?min\(links, resolved, rejected\) < 0)(?=(?:(?!# Evidence:)[\s\S])*?resolved \+ rejected != links)(?=(?:(?!# Evidence:)[\s\S])*?unsafe_urls > 0)(?=(?:(?!# Evidence:)[\s\S])*?missing_alt_decisions > 0)(?=(?:(?!# Evidence:)[\s\S])*?assert)(?=(?:(?!# Evidence:)[\s\S])*?return)(?:(?!# Evidence:)[\s\S])*?return
